author: garyrong
content: QQ, for the empty recipient and transaction carrys the value, if the recipient is the precompile, shall we charge the account-creation cost?

author: mariusvanderwijden
content: Currently we don't in the spec tests

author: gurukamath
content: Yeah. Going by the EIP document, we should charge the account-creation cost here. Probably not worth it to carve out an exception for no-balance pre-compiles. I'll update the EELS implementation and the spec tests.

author: danceratopz
content: Thanks for catching and raising this!
